case_title: SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY LAND TRUST VS. CARLOS FLORES ET AL

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, CARLOS

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY LAND TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, CARLOS DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (NO RENT DUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY LAND TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, CARLOS DOES 1 TO 5
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 70453072)
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, DECLARATION (TRANSACTION ID # 70245818) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY LAND TRUST

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 70436236), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY LAND TRUST SERVED JUN-30-2023, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, CARLOS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY LAND TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLORES, CARLOS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 285 TURK STREET, #303 SAN FRANCISCO CA 94102 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 70436236)
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, CARLOS
DECLARATION RE: AUTHENTICITY OF LEASE (TRANSACTION ID # 70436236) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY LAND TRUST

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 70436236), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY LAND TRUST SERVED JUN-30-2023, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $64.83 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY LAND TRUST

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 70436236) AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, CARLOS
